hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -q 'tests/\|modules/'; then cd C:/Users/CarolineZepecki/pv-rate-sim && python -m pytest tests/ -x -q 2>&1 | tail -5; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -qE '\.env$'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit .env files containing API keys' >&2; exit 2; fi
